channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: What we know about Iran’s latest attacks on Israel
item.description: Israel’s air defence system failed to stop at least two Iranian missile strikes on southern Israel.

item.title: Will the Houthis join Iran in war against Israel and the US?
item.description: The Yemeni armed group says all options are on the table.

item.title: Trump issues 48-hour Hormuz Strait ultimatum, threatens Iran power plants
item.description: Iran responds to Trump's threat by saying all US energy infrastructure in the region will be targeted if it is attacked.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump threatens to attack power plants over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Donald Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iran's power plants if it fails to open the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours.

item.title: Saudi Arabia expels Iran military attache, four embassy staff
item.description: Move follows attack on Red Sea port of Yanbu, Saudi Arabia's main oil export outlet, after Iran blocked Hormuz Strait.

item.title: Iran strikes towns near Israel’s nuclear site, wounds over 100
item.description: Iran targets Dimona and Arad, injuring more than 100 people, in retaliation for an attack on its Natanz nuclear site.

item.title: WHO says attack on Sudan hospital killed 64, including 13 children
item.description: The attack on a teaching hospital in Al Deain, the capital of East Darfur state, has rendered the facility non-functiona

item.title: State of emergency declared as Iranian missile hits Arad in southern Israel
item.description: A state of emergency has been declared in Arad, southern Israel after an Iranian missile strike.

item.title: US says it has crippled Iranian threat in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The US says it hit Iranian coastal missile sites and infrastructure, crippling Tehran’s threat to the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Joe Kent speaks out against Iran war at prayer event after resigning
item.description: Joe Kent says he resigned as director of the US National Counterterrorism Center over opposition to the war in Iran.
